baselines.notes: 28/30 prompts passed. Strong arithmetic performance. Previous 10-prompt suite scored 0.90.
20/20 prompts passed. Perfect tool calling with expanded suite including timezone, multi-tool chains, and adversarial prompts.
21/25 prompts passed. Good reasoning across syllogisms, spatial, common sense, and logic puzzles. Min floor set to 0.65 to allow for variance.

4/25 prompts passed. Model struggles with specific image content recognition using .containsText/.matchesRegex scoring. Previous trivial .nonEmpty scoring gave 100%. Min floor set to 0.10. Consider relaxing scoring criteria or improving prompts.
